workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask what exact wording should be used for not-yet-reached scaffold sections.
workflow_runs.decision: Draft scaffold files and sections must explicitly mark unreached work with a clear not-yet-reached status. Do not leave future workflow surfaces empty or ambiguous; every scaffolded file should show whether it has been touched, what is known, what is unknown, and the next step.
